reason: Verify architecture boundary and compute-free tcrv.exec invariants.
Verify metadata does not bypass capability legality or selection.
Verify ODS/core dialect changes remain execution and diagnostic focused.
Verify registry/interface behavior and diagnostics for plugin-owned metadata.
Verify target-specific runtime semantics stay plugin-local.
Verify pass ordering and no soft legality regressions.
Verify emitted metadata is bounded and not executable/runtime evidence.
Verify RVV remains unsupported/deferred without runtime codegen claim.
Verify scalar fallback remains legally selected and plugin-owned.
Verify tests live under organized directories and check-tianchenrv covers them.
